actions.expression: (() => { const selectors = ['#segmented-like-button button', 'like-button-view-model button', 'button[aria-label^="Me gusta"]', 'button[aria-label^="like"]']; for (const selector of selectors) { const el = document.querySelector(selector); if (!el) continue; const label = el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.innerText || ''; if (/dislike|no me gusta/i.test(label)) continue; el.scrollIntoView({block:'center'}); el.click(); return {ok:true, selector, label}; } return {ok:false, error:'like positivo no encontrado'}; })()
